acceptance_answers.can_the_branch_hygiene_regression_be_con: Yes, for newly generated PB release branches using governance/<pb_slug>.
acceptance_answers.was_the_remediation_validated: Yes. PB-036 validated governance/release-automation-validation with no branch_pattern_not_allowed, blockers [], delete_branch true, governance success, and comment_refusal not called.
acceptance_answers.what_caused_the_regression: branch_pattern_not_allowed caused by release branches outside ALLOWED_BRANCH_PREFIXES.
acceptance_answers.why_did_it_occur: PB release tooling generated usbay/* while branch hygiene only allowed governance/* and dependabot/*.
acceptance_answers.why_was_the_alternative_rejected: Option A would add usbay/* to ALLOWED_BRANCH_PREFIXES and unnecessarily widen deletion-eligible branch policy.

final_governance_summary.drift_identified: Branch hygiene accepted governance/* and dependabot/* while release tooling generated usbay/*.
open_items: Commit, push, review, and merge PB-035/PB-036/PB-037 evidence through governed PR review.
Run full CI before merge as the final repository-wide governance gate.
residual_risks: Existing open usbay/* PB branches may still fail branch hygiene unless migrated or handled by a separate governed action.
PB-035 and PB-036 changes remain uncommitted in the current working tree at the time of PB-037 evidence generation.
Full repository pytest was not completed in the previous PB-035 stream because it became long-running; focused branch-hygiene validation passed.
final_governance_summary.root_cause: PB release branches were generated with a prefix not accepted by governed branch hygiene, causing branch_pattern_not_allowed.

generated_metadata.generated_pr_body:
## PURPOSE
PB-037 closes the branch hygiene regression investigation by consolidating PB-033 root cause, PB-034 policy drift, PB-035 remediation decision, and PB-036 validation success into one auditable evidence artifact.

## RISK
If closure is recorded without evidence, USBAY could falsely mark the regression closed while valid PB release branches still trigger branch_pattern_not_allowed or post-merge refusal comments.

## POLICY LINK
AGENTS.md branch governance, fail-closed behavior, audit-first engineering, and no false governance states. Evidence sources: scripts/governed_branch_hygiene.py, scripts/usbay_pb_release.py, scripts/usbay_pb_metadata_authority.py, governance/evidence/pb035/branch_policy_alignment_report.json, governance/evidence/pb036/release_automation_validation.json.

## REQUIRED APPROVALS
USBAY-AUDIT and USBAY-GLOBAL23 review are required before merge. No admin merge, auto-approval, or branch protection bypass is permitted.

## GOVERNANCE CHECKS
Closure requires JSON parse, diff hygiene, conflict marker scan, generated metadata validation, required governance section validation, and evidence that governance/* release branches pass branch hygiene without comment_refusal().

## AUDIT
PB-037 records the root cause, drift, remediation decision, validation evidence, residual risks, open items, final closure decision, and status in governance/evidence/pb037/release_governance_closure_report.json.

## IMPACT
The branch hygiene regression is closed for newly generated PB release branches because PB release tooling now generates governance/<pb_slug> and PB-036 validated that branch hygiene completes without branch_pattern_not_allowed or refusal comments.

## Decision
CLOSED

## Status
VERIFIED

blocker_chain: comment_refusal() can render governed post-merge branch hygiene refusal

evidence.fact: _allowed_branch_name() returns branch_name.startswith(ALLOWED_BRANCH_PREFIXES) after rejecting empty, absolute, or parent traversal names.
evaluate_branch_hygiene() appends branch_pattern_not_allowed when _allowed_branch_name(state.branch_name) is false.
main() calls comment_refusal() when decision.delete_branch is false and dry-run is not set.

pb034_policy_drift_summary.drift_effect: Valid USBAY PB release branches could be generated outside the branch hygiene allow-list.
pb034_policy_drift_summary.source_from_pb035: PB-034 proved governed branch hygiene allowed only governance/ and dependabot/ while PB release tooling generated usbay/ branches.

governance_impact.migration_impact: Existing open usbay/* branches may still fail branch hygiene. New PB release branches generated by USBAY tooling use governance/*.

option_a.reason_rejected: This would widen the branch deletion allow-list to another namespace. PB-035 only needs PB release branches to align with existing branch hygiene policy, so widening the allow-list is unnecessary and weaker under least privilege.

option_b.reason_selected: Option B resolves the drift without expanding ALLOWED_BRANCH_PREFIXES. This preserves least privilege and keeps branch deletion governance scoped to the existing governance branch namespace.

source_artifact_availability.evidence_boundary: PB-037 uses PB-035 and PB-036 artifacts plus current repository code evidence. It does not fabricate missing PB-033 or PB-034 standalone artifacts.
